title: Chapter 3
content:
Chapter 3: Target Acquired!

Liam knew this was real, he had confirmed it first hand as he had no idea what the potential of the rebate he had in his grasp.

"The fuck is this?" Liam blurted out but the doorbell soon rang again, Liam rushed to the door hoping it was Darren so he could explain what was going on to him but it was Rachel.

"Huh?" Liam thought to himself, wondering why she had come back here considering he had already paid the rent she requested.

"Hello Rachel, did you forget something?" Liam asked but he could see the woman was flustered and could barely hold his eyes.

He instantly knew what this was, it was no doubt physical attraction, and she must have come back here to get his contact information.

"U-Um... I’m sorry, I don’t usually do this but is it possible for..." Rachel stopped herself.

Liam already knew she was a low tier MILF and the returns he could get from her was low.

This already told Liam that if this relationship was based solely on his rebate system, she would be one of the worst candidates to invest time in.

"... Sorry, this is stupid. I shouldn’t have returned, sorry for wasting your time," Rachel apologized and this was something that Lima found adorable.

He smiled, he knew he had lost Sara but that didn’t mean he should put his sex life on hold, it wouldn’t hurt to understand the basics of his system and if things don’t work out with Rachel, there was nothing to lose.

"Hey, Rachel, can I have your number?" Liam said with a gorgeous smile across his face, Rachel’s face flushed red.

She had no idea if someone so young and attractive would want to deal with a woman who was not only older but had been married.

She smiled and gave Liam her number despite the initial panic, Liam took it down.

"Is there any mister I have to worry about?" Liam asked, and this question was a clear indication he had no intention of being platonic.

Sara had exposed him to the wide side of life and this was something he planned to keep exploring even if it was no longer with her.

Rachel smiled but before the interaction could go any further, Darren returned or at least came into Liam’s line of sight..

Liam established eye contact with him and it was subtle, but he managed to convey his message with that single glance prompting Darren to stop in his tracks.

He began to take a few steps back, he had no problem if Liam wanted to use Rachel as a rebound.

Even though it could potentially affect him, Rachel was a professional when it came to her private and work life so Darren knew even if Liam managed to screw things up it wouldn’t affect him.

"There is no mister, no ring on this finger..." Rachel said while awkwardly showing off her finger, Liam could instantly tell she wasn’t used to this.

If anything, it showed how long she has been out of the market but Liam leaned in close to her.

Liam knew he was attractive, and thanks to his previous position, women threw themselves at him so female attention wasn’t something he was starved of.

"That is good to know," Liam said, before helping her button the top of her exposed cleavage.

He had no idea what came over him but Liam wondered if she would refuse him, and if so, what would she say or do in this situation.

"W-What are you doing?" Rachel questioned, clearly startled by this action.

"I don’t think this button was undone the first time you came around," Liam said bluntly and this was true, Rachel had taken it down a notch to show him more of what she was working with.

And if this was her go to, there was a very high chance what she was looking for was something of a sexual nature.

"W-Well..." Rachel was flustered, her face was so red one would think her blood was boiling beneath her skin.

"I liked it better the first time... Maybe in a more..." Liam paused, staring right at the top of her soft cleavage with a smile.

"... private setting you could show me more of it," Liam said before taking off his hands, he didn’t use this opportunity to cop a feel either.

"I will see you soon, Rachel," Liam said and Darren was flabbergasted by the poetry he was hearing from his hidden position.

Liam was smooth, such a goddamn smooth talker but that was why he rose so fast as a lawyer, words were his best friends.

Rachel smiled before turning around, Liam had to admit, she had the perfect body and Liam could certainly see himself having fun with it.

He had been so focused on work that he failed to realize that there were so many Sara’s in the world but Liam knew he had to get his body into better shape.

He had no excuse not to, the distraction was gone which was work and he had to shape the temple which would now become his primary source of income, his body.

Rachel disappeared out of sight and Darren appeared, he had a look of amazement on his face but he was more surprised that Liam had chosen her as his rebound.

"Damn man! You wasted no time!" Darren expected him to sulk a bit like most people do but Liam was back on the horse.

However, this was also a good thing because Darren knew it would only be a matter of time before he bounces back.

"I have no idea why I even did that," Liam said with an awkward smile.

"I also didn’t know you liked them older," Darren said with a smirk but he couldn’t blame them. Rachel was a well-baked factory that he had considered as well.

However, Darren was smart enough to keep it professional among them even though he wasn’t so sure he had the same sweet mouth as Liam.

"I’m done with the younger ladies, they all want one thing at this point," Liam scoffed before stepping aside to allow Darren enter.

Liam joined him as he got ready to return home, he was still living in a relatively comfortable place compared to Darren’s place.

And the thing that made him respect Darren the most was he never once asked for a handout despite the previous gap in their finances.

Even now, Darren had no idea he paid for the rent and Liam had no intention of telling him.
